generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataRaw
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataRaw : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataRaw
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANPointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual and depth sensing"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageRaw, VisualImageRaw
]

instance DepthImageRaw : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VisualImageRaw : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance DepthImage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageRaw
]

instance VisualImage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual image data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VisualImageRaw
]

instance OnboardSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor for ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataRaw
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataRaw : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OnboardSpeedSensor
]

instance OnboardSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor for steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataRaw
]

instance SteeringAngleDataRaw : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OnboardSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data including speed and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataRaw, SteeringAngleDataRaw
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance DBSCANPointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANPointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking and state estimation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control logic for lead vehicle detection and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance DBSCANPointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for Kalman filter-based object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for vehicle state data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for GPU-accelerated processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 scripting environment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ACCService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization, saving, and reporting of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, VehicleStateReport
]

instance ACCService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation offloading for Adaptive Cruise Control system execution"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteACCControlAction
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of object tracks, vehicle state, and projected path for driver transparency"
]

instance VehicleStateReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Report generation for performance monitoring and troubleshooting"
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic ACC control based on lead vehicle detection"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual remote control of ACC via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting desired speed to voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation for vehicle control"
]

instance TraxxasSlashVehicle : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle built on Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium teleoperated vehicle"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX microcomputer for onboard processing"
]

instance NVIDIAOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Orin Nano microcomputer for edge computing"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking) and remote management commands (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed) from DT to PT via motor and steering actuation components."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms, as per 3GPP TS 22.185 and hardware constraints."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle), Digital Twin Entity (cloud), User Entity (cloud), and Cross-System Entity; components communicate via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase of the vehicle lifecycle, focusing on real-time monitoring and control during vehicle operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with latency ≤100 ms and clock sync accuracy of 100 ms; specific verification and validation methods not detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; OPC UA considered for Data Translation FE per ISO 23247."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin and User Entities hosted in cloud infrastructure."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework reference architecture adapted for automotive systems."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system design compliant with ISO 15622 for ACC; cybersecurity measures not addressed."
]
